message:
chore: extend .gitignore with agent debug/scratch ephemeral patterns

Add ignore rules for recurring ephemeral files generated by
concurrent AI coding agents:

- Agent debug diff/log files (_ext_log.diff, _recent_agent_commits.diff,
  _ubs_findings.jsonl, _ubs_summary.json, ubs-scan.txt, etc.)
- Agent-generated fix/debug scripts (fix_fs.py, fix_tests.py,
  filter_panics.py)
- Scratch test binaries and source (test_mock*, print_env,
  src/bin/test_duration.rs, src/bin/test_time.rs)

These files appear constantly from multi-agent workflows and
should never be committed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -122,3 +122,25 @@ parse_*.py
 tests.log
 # Root-level scratch test files (agent-generated debug/repro harnesses)
 /test_*.rs
+
+# Agent debug diff/log files
+_ext_log.diff
+_recent_agent_commits.diff
+_ubs_findings.jsonl
+_ubs_summary.json
+ubs-scan.txt
+ubs-src-results.json
+findings.jsonl
+ubs_crit.jsonl
+
+# Agent-generated fix/debug scripts
+fix_fs.py
+fix_tests.py
+filter_panics.py
+
+# Scratch test binaries and source
+/test_mock*
+/print_env
+/print_env.rs
+src/bin/test_duration.rs
+src/bin/test_time.rs
